title: asphodeline damascena subsp. ovoidea
intro: Asphodeline damascena subsp. ovoidea is a type of flowering plant, known as a bulbous perennial, that belongs to the Asphodelaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Asphodeline damascena subsp. ovoidea is prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of conditions.
